title: Delicious Melting Snowman Hot Chocolate Bomb with Milk Chocolate Chips and Mini Marshmallows - Christmas Gift Stocking Filler - 75g
features: Chocolate melting snowman 75g in a Christmas design tie-bag
Drinking hot chocolate - filled with milk chocolate chips and marshmallows.
All you need is mug of hot milk, place in the snowman, stir and watch in amazement how the choc chips and snowman melts with the mallows magically appear.
Ideal festive hot chocolate drink and xmas gift for everyone.
Cocoa: 30% in white chocolate, 30% in milk chocolate, 56% in dark chocolate.
description: Product description Ingredients - white chocolate 61.3% (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, sweet whey powder, emulsifier SOYALECITHIN), milk chocolate 26.7% (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifiers (SOYALECITHIN, E476), marshmallows 6.7% (glucose-fructose syrup, sugar, water, gelatine, maize starch, flavour, glycerine), 5.25% dark chocolate (cocoa mass, sugar, cocoa butter, emulsifier SOYALECITHIN), plant concentrates 0.04% (safflower, lemon), plant concentrates 0.01% (radish, blackcurrant, apple). Ingredients 61.3% white chocolate (sugar, cocoa butter, WHOLE MILK POWDER, SWEET WHEY POWDER, emulsifier SOY LECITHIN), 26.7% milk chocolate (sugar, cocoa butter, WHOLE MILK POWDER, cocoa mass, emulsifier SOY LECITHIN, E476), 6.7% marshmallows (glucose-fructose syrup , sugar, water, gelatin, CORN STARCH, flavor, glycerin), 5.25% dark chocolate (cocoa mass, sugar, cocoa butter, emulsifier SOY LECITHIN), 0.04% plant concentrates (safflower, lemon), 0.01% plant concentrates (radish, black currant, apple) Directions Place in a mug of hot milk, stir, and watch as it melts with marshmallows magically appearing.
